NAVAREA XIX 57/17
NORWEGIAN SEA. 
1. SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 10 JUN TO 20 JUL BY WG COLUMBUS-5BNS2. 
TOWING 8 X 3800 METER LONG CABLES AND SUPPORT VESSELS: 
M/V WG MAGELLAN, M/V BRAVO SAPPHIRE, M/V STORM WEST 
WILL BE OPERATING WITHIN THE FOLLOWING AREA: 
A.66-26.0N 008-28.0E
B.66-22.0N 008-41.0E
C.66-07.0N 008-38.0E
D.65-47.0N 007-53.0E
E.65-53.0N 007-35.0E
F.66-15.0N 008-05.0E
VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 3 NM
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 53/17
     NORMAL   0         21         FALSE   FALSE   FALSE      NO-BOK   X-NONE   _X-NONE_                                                     MICROSOFTINTERNETEXPLORER4                                                                                                                               <W:LSDEXCEPTION L
